_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: Within the neurofibromas, 4.37% of cells were Schwann cells, while 79.8% were fibroblasts and fibroblast-like cells... Human cutaneous neurofibromas are 3.16% Schwann cells
resourceName: NF1 porcine model with exon 31 excision
details: Neurofibromas contained 4.37% Schwann cells and 79.8% fibroblasts, closely resembling human neurofibroma cellular composition (human cutaneous neurofibromas are 3.16% Schwann cells)
